overview:
## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition] class contains an instance of this class, [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition/spatialPipeline], to add optional sound layers to the output.

On top of the original audio signal designated by [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipeline/Flags-swift.struct/directPathTransmission], this class optionally includes audio layers for environmental effects, such as [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialCategory/earlyReflections] or [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialCategory/lateReverb], in the output.  To control the amount of volume that either audio layer possesses in the mixer’s output, adjust the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipelineEntry/sendLevel] for the layer’s respective [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipelineEntry] member in the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipeline/entries] dictionary.

# PHASESpatialPipeline

**Class**

An object that specifies the volume of optional environmental effects.

## Declaration

```swift
class PHASESpatialPipeline
```

## Overview

The [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition] class contains an instance of this class, [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialMixerDefinition/spatialPipeline], to add optional sound layers to the output.

On top of the original audio signal designated by [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipeline/Flags-swift.struct/directPathTransmission], this class optionally includes audio layers for environmental effects, such as [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialCategory/earlyReflections] or [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialCategory/lateReverb], in the output.  To control the amount of volume that either audio layer possesses in the mixer’s output, adjust the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipelineEntry/sendLevel] for the layer’s respective [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipelineEntry] member in the [doc://com.apple.phase/documentation/PHASE/PHASESpatialPipeline/entries] dictionary.

## Creating a Spatial Pipeline

- **init(flags:)**: Creates a spatial pipeline with the specified flags.
- **PHASESpatialPipeline.Flags**: Sound resonance options for a spatial pipeline.

## Inspecting Effects

- **flags**: A collection of environmental effects to include in the output.
- **entries**: Audio layers for environmental effects to add to the output.

## Sound Reflections and Resonance

- **PHASESpatialPipelineEntry**: An audio layer with an adjustable volume for a spatial mixer’s output.
- **PHASESpatialCategory**: Sound resonance effects for spatial mixing.
- **PHASESpatialPipeline.Flags**: Sound resonance options for a spatial pipeline.

## Inherits From

- NSObject

## Conforms To

- CVarArg
- CustomDebugStringConvertible
- CustomStringConvertible
- Equatable
- Hashable
- NSObjectProtocol
